content.query:
SELECT			OrderNumber
,				CustomerOrderNumber
,				DeliveryNumber
,               PackageNumber
,				TrackingNumber
,				SUM(PubFreightCost) OVER (PARTITION BY 
                OrderNumber, CustomerOrderNumber, DeliveryNumber, PackageNumber, TrackingNumber) as PublishedFreight
,				SUM(DiscFreightCost) OVER (PARTITION BY 
                OrderNumber, CustomerOrderNumber, DeliveryNumber, PackageNumber, TrackingNumber) as DiscountedFreight
FROM			PWP.LC_SHIPMENTS
ORDER BY		ShipDate Desc, OrderNumber, DeliveryNumber, PackageNumber
